svg.svg_code: <svg viewBox="34 24 1532 1128" width="1532" height="1128" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><filter id="shadow" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feDropShadow dx="0" dy="10" stdDeviation="14" flood-color="#5C4634" flood-opacity="0.14" /></filter></defs><g filter="url(#shadow)"><rect x="34" y="24" width="1532" height="1128" rx="32" fill="#FFFDF9" /></g></svg>

text.text: V3 阶段 × 角色矩阵
左看阶段，横看角色；每格同时写动作、prompt 和边界，图内只承载角色责任，不承载完整技能细节。
收敛 / 编排 / 收尾

svg.svg_code: <svg viewBox="346 262 414.2200012207031 80" width="414.2200012207031" height="80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><filter id="cardShadow" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feDropShadow dx="0" dy="5" stdDeviation="7" flood-color="#5C4634" flood-opacity="0.12" /></filter></defs><g filter="url(#cardShadow)" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" transform="matrix(1,0,0,1,70,160)"><rect x="276" y="102" width="182" height="80" rx="16" fill="#FFF4E3" stroke="#D9A866" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" /><rect x="486" y="102" width="182" height="80" rx="16" fill="#EEF5F1" stroke="#A3C0B0" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" /><text x="294" y="128" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">你</text><text x="294" y="152" class="cardTitle" fill="#2F231A" font-size="18px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="800">提出需求</text><text x="294" y="170" class="cardSub" fill="#594C40" font-size="12px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif">给目标，不先拆解</text><text x="504" y="128" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">using-superpowers</text><text x="504" y="152" class="cardTitle" fill="#2F231A" font-size="18px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="800">主对话先收敛</text><text x="504" y="170" class="cardSub" fill="#594C40" font-size="12px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif">prompt: 先按 superpowers 流程来</text></g></svg>

stroke="#B49ED7" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" /><text x="294" y="376" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">你</text><text x="294" y="400" class="cardTitle" fill="#2F231A" font-size="18px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="800">要求独立 worktree</text><text x="294" y="418" class="cardSub" fill="#594C40" font-size="12px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif">main 不直接写功能</text><text x="504" y="376" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">using-git-worktrees</text><text x="504" y="400" class="cardTitle" fill="#2F231A" font-size="18px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="800">隔离执行</text><text x="504" y="418" class="cardSub" fill="#594C40" font-size="12px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif">只负责工作区分离</text><text x="714" y="376" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">handoff</text><text x="714" y="400" class="cardTitle" fill="#2F231A" font-size="18px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="800">读 Plan File</text><text x="714" y="418" class="cardSub" fill="#594C40" font-size="12px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif">必要时先补 handoff</text><text x="924" y="376" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">feature session</text><text x="924" y="400" class="cardTitle" fill="#2F231A" font-size="18px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="800">并行 or 顺序执行</text><text x="924" y="418" class="cardSub" fill="#594C40" font-size="12px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif">subagent-driven-development / executing-plans</text></g></svg>

<svg viewBox="766 634 602 80" width="602" height="80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><filter id="cardShadow" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feDropShadow dx="0" dy="5" x="906" y="474" width="182" height="80" rx="16" fill="#F0EAFB" stroke="#B49ED7" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" /><rect x="1116" y="474" width="182" height="80" rx="16" fill="#EEF7EE" stroke="#9DC29A" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" /><text x="714" y="500" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">handoff</text><text x="714" y="524" class="cardTitle" fill="#2F231A" font-size="18px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="800">阶段交接更新</text><text x="714" y="542" class="cardSub" fill="#594C40" font-size="12px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif">记录进度 / 风险 / 下一条验证</text><text x="924" y="500" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">TDD / verify</text><text x="924" y="524" class="cardTitle" fill="#2F231A" font-size="18px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="800">TDD / debug / verify</text><text x="924" y="542" class="cardSub" fill="#594C40" font-size="12px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif">bug → 系统排查 / 并行调查</text><text x="1134" y="500" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">review</text><text x="1134" y="524" class="cardTitle" fill="#2F231A" font-size="18px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="800">只做 review</text><text x="1134" y="542" class="cardSub" fill="#594C40" font-size="12px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif">返回 findings，不展开实现</text></g></svg>

<svg viewBox="346 758 812 80" width="812" height="80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><filter id="cardShadow" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feDropShadow dx="0" dy="5" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" /><text x="294" y="624" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">你</text><text x="294" y="648" class="cardTitle" fill="#2F231A" font-size="18px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="800">最终验收测试</text><text x="294" y="666" class="cardSub" fill="#594C40" font-size="12px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif">按用户视角跑一遍</text><text x="504" y="624" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">主对话</text><text x="504" y="648" class="cardTitle" fill="#2F231A" font-size="18px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="800">接管最终交接</text><text x="504" y="666" class="cardSub" fill="#594C40" font-size="12px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif">通过后才切回 main</text><text x="714" y="624" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">handoff</text><text x="714" y="648" class="cardTitle" fill="#2F231A" font-size="18px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="800">验收问题交接</text><text x="714" y="666" class="cardSub" fill="#594C40" font-size="12px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif">把问题写清楚再回修</text><text x="924" y="624" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">feature session</text><text x="924" y="648" class="cardTitle" fill="#2F231A" font-size="18px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="800">回 TDD / 验证闭环</text><text x="924" y="666" class="cardSub" fill="#594C40" font-size="12px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif">验收不过直接修</text></g></svg>

<svg viewBox="346 882 1253.8399963378906 80" width="1253.8399963378906" height="80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><filter id="cardShadow" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">主对话</text><text x="504" y="772" class="cardTitle" fill="#2F231A" font-size="18px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="800">收尾主控</text><text x="504" y="790" class="cardSub" fill="#594C40" font-size="12px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif">neat-freak / 同步 docs 和记忆</text><text x="714" y="748" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">handoff</text><text x="714" y="772" class="cardTitle" fill="#2F231A" font-size="18px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="800">知识同步完成</text><text x="714" y="790" class="cardSub" fill="#594C40" font-size="12px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif">docs / handoff / memory 对齐</text><text x="1334" y="748" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">main 分支</text><text x="1334" y="772" class="cardTitle" fill="#2F231A" font-size="18px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="800">检查 main 干净</text><text x="1334" y="790" class="cardSub" fill="#594C40" font-size="12px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif">脏了先清理或提交，再 merge / push</text><text x="294" y="748" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">你</text><text x="294" y="772" class="cardTitle" fill="#2F231A" font-size="18px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="800">确认闭环完成</text><text x="294" y="790" class="cardSub" fill="#594C40" font-size="12px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif">看最终结果</text></g></svg>

<svg viewBox="70 1030 1520 92" width="1520" height="92" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><filter id="cardShadow" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feDropShadow dx="0" dy="5" stdDeviation="7" flood-color="#5C4634" flood-opacity="0.12" /></filter></defs><g transform="matrix(1,0,0,1,70,160) translate(0,870)" filter="url(#cardShadow)" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif"><rect x="0" y="0" width="1520" height="92" rx="20" fill="#FFF8F0" stroke="#E7D7C2" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" /><rect x="22" y="26" width="170" height="28" rx="14" fill="#F2E1C8" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" /><text x="107" y="45" text-anchor="middle" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">黑字 = 主动作</text><rect x="206" y="26" width="230" height="28" rx="14" fill="#E4F0EB" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" /><text x="321" y="45" text-anchor="middle" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">小字 = prompt / 边界 / 输出</text><rect x="450" y="26" width="210" height="28" rx="14" fill="#E9EEF7" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" /><text x="555" y="45" text-anchor="middle" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">阶段条 = 进入下一阶段的门</text><rect x="674" y="26" width="230" height="28" rx="14" fill="#F2E5F7" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" /><text x="789" y="45" text-anchor="middle" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">空白 = 该阶段该角色无主动作</text><rect x="918" y="26" width="236" height="28" rx="14" fill="#EEF7EE" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" /><text x="1036" y="45" text-anchor="middle" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">feature 只在实现 / 验证闭环里干活</text><rect x="1166" y="26" width="328" height="28" rx="14" fill="#F4E9EA" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" /><text x="1330" y="45" text-anchor="middle" class="pillText" fill="#2B2119" font-size="11px" font-family="Noto Sans SC,PingFang SC,Microsoft YaHei,sans-serif" font-weight="700">main 只做总控、集成和收尾</text></g></svg>
